title: FOOD JUSTICE - 211info
text: EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO FOOD JUSTICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food pantry and free food market that includes culturally specific food options. 333 SE 223rd Avenue Suite 100 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Highland Free Food Market: 295 NE 24th Street, Gresham, OR 97030: 2nd Wednesday of the month 4pm-5:30pm Email (503) 669-8350 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 669-8350 Main phone (503) 232-4448 Hotline UNICA Crisis Line/Linea de Crisis UNICA Main phone (503) 669-8350 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Gresham and Portland (Multnomah and Clackamas Counties only) Services: Food Pantries Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY RENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - EVICTION PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - HOME FINDER SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH AND FAMILY EDUCATION ENGAGEMENT PREK-12 INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION AND REFERRAL LEGAL SERVICES - FAIR HOUSING ENFORCEMENT COLLABORATIVE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - UNICA UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
